name: tophant-clawvault-mask-project
description: Mask company names, project amounts, and contextual person names in local project documents before analysis.
author: Tophant SPAI Lab

permissions_rationale.read_files: Reads only the user-specified local document to produce sanitized content
permissions_rationale.write_files: Writes optional sanitized output files and optional saved policy JSON files

generate-policy.description: Generate the default company-project masking policy.

mask-file.description: Mask a local project document and return sanitized content as JSON.
